changeSet.author: yusufarslanalp
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE users ( id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, username VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE, password_hash VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, role VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL );
INSERT INTO users (id, password_hash, role, username) VALUES (1, '$2a$10$eEBGszE.GTZXlKvfhpmre.437thNTUSn5M.rff3.7Zai8fyfrBWBS', 'ADMIN', 'admin'), (2, '$2a$10$Em.OFvCM4VwpcaEXu7ZEIeq6iC2Bwih7h0/xc2fPTlYzrb4T4ybMG', 'AGENCY', 'agency');

changeSet.author: yusufarslanalp
yusufarslanalp
